Name: -1_prime_mach_hybrid_ex90
Representative_Docs: ['Prime Plug-in Hybrid Electric Vehicle is proof of having it all. The practicality of an SUV meets potent performance wrapped in a sporty package backed by a robust plug-in hybrid electric powertrain. For 2024, Prime returns as one of the quickest vehicles available, featuring two sport-oriented grades, SC and XSE, both of which feature standard all-wheel drive and a wealth of cutting-edge features.', "When all of these factors are taken together, it's clear that Prime is a class leader, a vehicle that sets the standard for all Plug-in Hybrid EV SUVs to follow now and into the future. Want to learn more? Discover Prime Plug-in Hybrid EV today on.com slash Prime.", "And just in case charging isn't possible, Prime simply operates as an efficient hybrid EV with an EPA-estimated 38 mpg combined or 94 mpg-e. Prime's chiseled good looks demand attention and hint at its performance. This starts with standard LED exterior lighting, which amplify Prime's head-turning style. The XSE grade takes design to new heights thanks to eye-catching two-tone exterior colors and 19-inch alloy wheels, both of which add a bit more sporting flair to Prime."]

Name: 1_warranty_000_000 mile_year
Representative_Docs: ['Best of all, every includes ToyotaCare, which provides two years or 25,000 miles of scheduled maintenance, whichever comes first, and two-year unlimited mileage of 24-hour roadside assistance. And since every variant is a hybrid electric vehicle, it includes a hybrid system warranty covering select components for eight years or 100,000 miles, whichever comes first, and a 10-year or 150,000-mile hybrid battery warranty, whichever comes first, making it a strong choice for long-term ownership.', "And every includes ToyotaCare, which provides two years or 25,000 miles of scheduled maintenance, whichever comes first, and two-year unlimited mileage of 24-hour roadside assistance. The strength of 's value is further enhanced in its hybrid grades, which come with an 8-year or 100,000-mile hybrid system warranty, whichever comes first, and a 10-year or 150,000-mile hybrid battery warranty, whichever comes first, making them strong choices for long-term ownership.", 'And Plug-in Hybrid includes ToyotaCare, which provides 2 years or 25,000 miles of scheduled maintenance, whichever comes first, and 2-year unlimited mileage of 24-hour roadside assistance. This strong value is further enhanced by an 8-year or 100,000-mile hybrid system warranty, whichever comes first, and a 10-year or 150,000-mile hybrid battery warranty, whichever comes first, making this electrified SUV a strong choice for long-term ownership.']

Name: 2_candy_k23_electric_america
Representative_Docs: ["Hello everyone. I want to add my warm welcome to you all for joining us to learn about the launch of our Candy Auto Evolution for All campaign, which is a major step to bringing candy electric cars to the U.S. market. I'm Jerry Lewin, one of the independent directors of Candy Technology, our NASDAQ listed parent company.", "In 2020, Northpoint and Candy continue to expand our financing program relationship with a new asset-based lending solution that will benefit Candy America's working capital and allow them to acquire more Power Sports and Candy EV inventory. Northpoint is honored to have been selected by Candy as the preferred lender for Candy's EV dealer inventory financing programs.", "Northpoint and Candy America are working together to identify new Candy EV dealers and to help establish a financially strong and stable Candy EV dealer network. We are excited to be partnering with the entire Candy America team as they premiere the Candy EV across North America. We look forward to a long, prosperous relationship and we're anxious to help them grow."]
